description_long: This is a large, round black bowl filled with a visually rich serving of ramen. The bowl contains a golden-brown broth with floating noodles, topped with several slices of pinkish-red meat, a halved boiled egg with a yellow yolk, and a variety of green vegetables and herbs. The surface of the broth is dotted with oil and small floating particles, giving it a slightly glossy appearance. The bowl itself has a wide, gently flared rim with a subtle decorative band near the edge. The arrangement of toppings is artful, with the meat slices grouped together and the egg and vegetables distributed for visual appeal. No utensils are present in or around the bowl.
description: A black bowl of ramen with golden broth, noodles, sliced meat, egg, and vegetables, arranged artfully on top. The bowl has a wide rim and subtle decorative band.
description_view_0: This view highlights the front of the bowl, showing the meat slices and egg most prominently, with noodles and vegetables visible beneath.
description_view_1: From this angle, the egg and meat slices are seen from the side, with more of the broth and floating toppings visible.
description_view_2: This view emphasizes the egg and green vegetables, with the meat slices partially visible at the back of the bowl.
description_view_3: The meat slices are most prominent in this view, positioned at the back, while the egg and vegetables are seen more from the side.
attribute_bowl_design: The bowl is made of ceramic with a matte black exterior and a wide, gently flared rim. A subtle, light-colored decorative band encircles the rim, adding a touch of elegance. The bowl's shape is deep and round, designed to hold a generous portion of soup.
attribute_topping_arrangement: The toppings are arranged with several slices of meat grouped together on one side, while a halved boiled egg is placed near the center. Green vegetables and herbs are scattered around the egg and meat, creating a balanced and visually appealing presentation.
attribute_noodle_visibility: The noodles are mostly submerged in the broth, with some strands visible near the surface and around the edges of the toppings. They are partially exposed but not prominently displayed above the broth.
attribute_broth_clarity: The broth appears slightly cloudy with a golden-brown hue, and there are visible floating particles and oil droplets on the surface. It is not fully clear, suggesting a rich and flavorful base.
attribute_utensil_presence: No utensils are present in or around the bowl in any of the images.
